Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config

Class CatalogOptions.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.CatalogOptions.Builder
Enclosing class:

public static final class CatalogOptions.Builder extends Object
Builder for CatalogOptions.

  • Method Details

    • createDefaultCatalogAndSchema

      public CatalogOptions.Builder createDefaultCatalogAndSchema(boolean value)
      Whether the default catalog and schema should be created automatically.
      Parameters:
      value - true to create default catalog and schema
      Returns:
      this builder

    • defaultCatalog

      public CatalogOptions.Builder defaultCatalog(String value)
      The default catalog name. Default is "datafusion".
      Parameters:
      value - the default catalog name
      Returns:
      this builder

    • defaultSchema

      public CatalogOptions.Builder defaultSchema(String value)
      The default schema name. Default is "public".
      Parameters:
      value - the default schema name
      Returns:
      this builder

    • informationSchema

      public CatalogOptions.Builder informationSchema(boolean value)
      Whether to create information_schema virtual tables for schema information.
      Parameters:
      value - true to enable information_schema
      Returns:
      this builder

    • location

      public CatalogOptions.Builder location(String value)
      Location scanned to load tables for the default schema.
      Parameters:
      value - the location path
      Returns:
      this builder

    • format

      public CatalogOptions.Builder format(String value)
      Type of TableProvider to use when loading default schema.
      Parameters:
      value - the format type
      Returns:
      this builder

    • hasHeader

      public CatalogOptions.Builder hasHeader(boolean value)
      Default value for has_header for CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE CSV.
      Parameters:
      value - true if CSV files have headers
      Returns:
      this builder

    • newlinesInValues

      public CatalogOptions.Builder newlinesInValues(boolean value)
      Specifies whether newlines in quoted CSV values are supported.
      Parameters:
      value - true to support newlines in values
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public CatalogOptions build()
      Builds the CatalogOptions.
      Returns:
      the built options
